headline: CRCL Stock Rebounds From 3-Month Low After OCC National Trust Bank Approval
summary: Circle received final approval from the OCC to establish First National Digital Currency Bank, completing a regulatory process that began with conditional approval in December 2025.

headline: Coinbase (COIN) Replaces Paul Grewal With Molly Abraham As Top Lawyer
summary: Coinbase Global (NasdaqGS:COIN) announced that Chief Legal Officer and Secretary Paul Grewal will step down effective July 31, 2026. Molly Abraham, currently Vice President, Legal, has been appointed to succeed him as General Counsel. The transition comes as Coinbase expands into new markets and asset classes, including UK approval to offer stocks and derivatives. Coinbase Global operates at the intersection of digital assets and regulated financial services, where legal judgment and...

headline: Circle Jumps 14% on OCC Trust Bank Approval; Coinbase and Strategy Gain 5% as Bitcoin Bounces
summary: A federal banking charter sent Circle stock surging Friday, but with 69% losses over the past year and a rival stablecoin backed by Visa looming, the question is whether this rally marks a turning point or just a dead-cat bounce.
